items.title: Get a budget-friendly means to always know where important items are with UGREEN’s FineTrack tag 4-pack at its $20 low
items.summary:
UGREEN FineTrack iOS Air Tracker Tags 4-Pack

Buy for $20 (Reg. $35)

What we love

If you’re planning spring and summer trips around your city, state, the country, or headed beyond our borders, you’ll definitely want the peace of mind of knowing where your essentials are. With this 4-pack, you’ll be getting a more budget-friendly AirTag-like experience (at its best price) to track down luggage, keys, personal gear, and so much more. Each tag comes with a “2-year battery life,” which can be quickly topped off by a USB-C connection.

items.title: Quickly add up to 256GB storage to your phone or laptop with SanDisk’s USB-C flash drive starting at just $40 today
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale on PC components and accessories, Woot is now offering SanDisk’s 128GB USB-C Phone Drive in the Arctic White colorway for $39.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee applies otherwise). This model originally launched at $50 but has more recently been selling for around $64 at Amazon. Today’s offer knocks $24 off that going rate with a 37% discount, bringing it down to one of the lowest prices we’ve tracked to date. You’ll also find the 256GB variant in the Maritime Blue finish marked down to $49.99 Prime shipped. That’s a straight-up 43% discount on its usual $88 price tag, and it also lands among the lowest prices we’ve seen for this model so far. Both capacities are now available at particularly solid prices – especially at a time when storage device prices have been steadily rising – so be sure to snag them after getting more details below.
